name: Quartiers Properties AB (publ)
summary: Quartiers Properties AB (publ) engages in the property development, management, and sales; and hotel management activities in Spain. The company operates Quartiers Apartment Hotel & Resort in Benahav√É¬≠s; Boho Club comprising two restaurants, two pools, and 30 rooms and bungalows in Marbella; develops villas and apartments; and offers concierge and letting services to buyers of apartments in Quartiers Properties project. It also offers property brokerage services. The company's real estate projects are located in the community of Hacienda del Se√É¬±orio de Cifuentes in Benahavis and Marbella, Spain. Quartiers Properties AB (publ) was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
